title: What We Know About the F-15E Strike Eagle Shot Down by Iran
summary_full: An F-15E Strike Eagle was lost to enemy fire and an A-10 Warthog crashed in the Persian Gulf region on Friday, officials said. A rescue helicopter was also fired upon.
summary_public: An F-15E Strike Eagle was lost to enemy fire and an A-10 Warthog crashed in the Persian Gulf region on Friday, officials said. A rescue helicopter was also fired upon.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: F-15E Strike Eagle Shot Down by Iran
